channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Comcast’s NBCUniversal Spinoff Gives Hollywood Its Next Major Deal Target  WSJ
  3. NBCUniversal to be split from Comcast in latest media shakeup  Reuters
  4. Comcast to Spin Off NBCUniversal, Ending a Long Union of Cable and Media  The New York Times
  5. Comcast Spinoff Could Rejuvenate Its Depressed Stock  Barron's

item.title: "Televised Nervous Breakdown": CEO of Palantir Suffers a Bit of a Meltdown During Live Interview - Futurism
item.description:
1. "Televised Nervous Breakdown": CEO of Palantir Suffers a Bit of a Meltdown During Live Interview  Futurism
  2. “Televised Nervous Breakdown”: CEO of Palantir Suffers a Bit of a Meltdown During Live Interview  Yahoo
  3. Palantir's Karp bashes OpenAI, Anthropic token model: 'Something has gone completely wrong'  CNBC
  4. Palantir CEO Says Some U.S. Government Customers Switched to Open Source AI  The Information
  5. Karp unleashes on frontier AI labs  Axios

item.title: Conair Recalls Over One Million Cuisinart Grill Brushes Due to Ingestion Hazard - U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (.gov)
item.description:
1. Conair Recalls Over One Million Cuisinart Grill Brushes Due to Ingestion Hazard  U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (.gov)
  2. Nearly 2 million wire grill brushes recalled. See affected products  USA Today
  3. Recall alert: 1.7M grill brushes recalled, metal bristles can come off  KIRO 7 News Seattle
  4. Millions of Grill Brushes Recalled After Reports of Metal Bristles Causing Serious Injuries  People.com
  5. More than 1 million Cuisinart grill brushes recalled due to ingestion hazard  thv11.com
